logger.doc:name: request reieved to email implementation flow

parse-template.doc:name: creating html templete with user data for user email conformation
parse-template.content: #[vars.emailbody]

email:send.doc:name: email send to the respective users with the respective bank data
email:send.subject: #["Please find your Transactions in this month -" ++ vars.bankName]

logger.doc:name: after email send to the repective user with thier account detailes
logger.message: =========after email send to the repective user with thier account detailes===========
